title: psychotria lanaensis
intro: Psychotria lanaensis, also known as Lana's Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psychotria lanaensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
